title: Author filter uses substring (LIKE) match rather than exact match
evidence: app.py:104-107 — SELECT ... WHERE author LIKE '%'||?||'%'; the value is bound as a parameter (no injection), but ?author=Rowling matches any author containing the substring
suggestion: Fine as-is; document that ?author= is a contains-match, or switch to exact `author = ?` if exact matching is intended
